title: GitUpdate
description: Git repository state payload. Delta model — only changed fields are sent after the initial snapshot.

repo_name.description: Repository name derived from the directory; null when no repo is active

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the repository root; null when no repo is active

branch.description: Current local branch name; null in detached HEAD state or when no repo active

remote_branch.description: Upstream tracking branch (e.g. 'origin/main'); null if not configured

ahead.description: Number of local commits ahead of the upstream; null when no repo is active

behind.description: Number of upstream commits the local branch is behind; null when no repo is active

modified.description: Count of modified (unstaged) tracked files; null when no repo is active

staged.description: Count of files staged for the next commit; null when no repo is active

deleted.description: Count of deleted tracked files; null when no repo is active

untracked.description: Count of untracked files; null when no repo is active

commits.description: Recent commits on the current branch, newest first; maximum 10 entries

hash.description: Abbreviated commit SHA (minimum 7 hex characters; longer for repos where 7 chars is not unique)

ts.description: Commit author timestamp in Unix milliseconds
